text.en: Yes, please send the full description. That pay rate sounds good. Is there a housing stipend included? And what's the start date?

_ww-text_text.en: Yes, please send the full description. That pay rate sounds good. Is there a housing stipend included? And what's the start date?

text.en: I've just emailed you the full description. Yes, there's a $1,200/month housing stipend or hospital-provided housing options. The position starts on February 15th, but there's some flexibility if you need a different start date.

_ww-text_text.en: I've just emailed you the full description. Yes, there's a $1,200/month housing stipend or hospital-provided housing options. The position starts on February 15th, but there's some flexibility if you need a different start date.

text.en: Perfect! I'll check my email. The February 15th start date works for me. How long is the contract? And is there an option to extend if things go well?

_ww-text_text.en: Perfect! I'll check my email. The February 15th start date works for me. How long is the contract? And is there an option to extend if things go well?

default.animationKeyframes: @keyframes slideInLeft { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }
@keyframes slideInRight { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }

text.en: Hello Sarah! Thanks for reaching out. The ICU position at Memorial offers $45-50/hr depending on experience, with 12-hour shifts (3 days/week). Would you like me to send you the full job description?

_ww-text_text.en: Hello Sarah! Thanks for reaching out. The ICU position at Memorial offers $45-50/hr depending on experience, with 12-hour shifts (3 days/week). Would you like me to send you the full job description?

text.en: Hi there! I'm interested in the ICU position at Memorial Hospital. Can you tell me more about the pay rate and schedule?

text.en: Thanks for sending over the contract. I've reviewed it and have a few questions about the housing stipend.

_ww-text_text.en: Thanks for sending over the contract. I've reviewed it and have a few questions about the housing stipend.

text.en: Do you have any positions available in Florida? I'm looking to relocate there for the winter months.

_ww-text_text.en: Do you have any positions available in Florida? I'm looking to relocate there for the winter months.

text.en: I'm currently on assignment but looking for my next opportunity. Do you have any pediatric positions starting in March?

en.defaultValue: I'm currently on assignment but looking for my next opportunity. Do you have any pediatric positions starting in March?

text.en: I'm interested in the ICU position at Memorial Hospital. Can you tell me more about the pay rate and schedule?

d50553e0-0bd2-4a9f-aa58-4fe4d4353ba2.code:
var newMessage = {
id: 0,
message_body: variables[/* Message Input - value */ '0640fbf5-833f-4fd6-b034-f90b1584dbce-value'],
media_url: "",
is_inbound: false,
sent_by_ai: true,
sent_at: Date.now(),
delivery_status: "sent",
is_read: true,
sender_id: pluginVariables[/* Xano Auth user */ 'f5856798-485d-47be-b433-d43d771c64e1']['user']?.['id'],
    media: { "url": (variables['6c079e24-d3f7-422c-89db-6e094799a548']?.['url'] || null) }
}

return newMessage

617b6fc8-c4a8-4879-9bd1-ec4f5b42e7a8.code:
// Set initial unread message counts for each contact
  variables['contact_1_unread'] = 2; // Sarah Johnson has 2 unread messages
  variables['contact_2_unread'] = 0; // Michael Thompson has no unread messages
  variables['contact_3_unread'] = 1; // Jessica Davis has 1 unread message
  variables['contact_4_unread'] = 0; // Robert Wilson has no unread messages
  variables['contact_5_unread'] = 0; // Emily Lee has no unread messages
